title: Explore fusion-aware quantification (research only)
context: Method exploration of fusion-aware quantification for EWSR1-FLI1 transcripts, explicitly NOT a diagnostic (PLAN backlog/M4). Research-only framing is binding. Binding guardrails: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA/biobanks) and identifiable patient data are out of scope; COSMIC/OncoKB/MSigDB-restricted are recipe-reference only; no clinical/diagnostic/prognostic/treatment language; research-only, not medical advice; provenance on every assertion.
objective: Explore fusion-aware quantification approaches on open Ewing data as a methods study, documenting feasibility and limitations without any diagnostic claim.
acceptanceCriteria: Fusion-aware quantification approaches are evaluated on open data with a reproducible recipe.
Findings are framed as method exploration, explicitly NOT a diagnostic or clinical tool.
Limitations and provenance are documented; no patient-facing claims.
output: output/fusion-aware-exploration.md (research-only feasibility study of fusion-aware quantification).
